prompt: In Mail, create a DRAFT reply to any inbox message (or new draft if no seed available) with body 'KinBench 156' AND attach a fresh screenshot (use Cmd+Shift+5 or `screencapture` to make a screenshot first, then attach to the draft). Subject should contain 'KinBench 156'. Do NOT send. Fast path for fallback: `screencapture ~/Desktop/kinbench/156-screenshot.png && cerebellum 'mail draft "KinBench 156" "KinBench 156" "$HOME/Desktop/kinbench/156-screenshot.png"'`.
